decisions.title_en: Anthropic publicly releases Claude Fable 5, a guard-railed Mythos-class model
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. New public model launch on 2026-06-09 (TechCrunch). Distinct from anthropic-glasswing-mythos (Project Glasswing infra) and anthropic-recursive-self-improvement (essay) published earlier; this is the actual public model release + Mythos 5 upgrade.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI confidentially files S-1 with SEC, one week after Anthropic
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. OpenAI confidential S-1 filing 2026-06-08 (Fortune). Anthropic IPO filing (June 1) is a separate story and is itself stale.

decisions.title_en: Apple pays Google ~$1B/year for custom 1.2T-param Gemini to power default Siri
decisions.reason: Previously published on 06-08 with title about Siri rebuild + allowing users to switch backend to Gemini/Claude/ChatGPT. New info surfacing post-keynote (MacRumors): the DEFAULT cloud Siri runs a custom 1.2T-parameter Gemini, Apple pays Google ~$1B/year, weights run inside Apple Private Cloud Compute. Substantive new financial/architecture detail not in prior coverage.

decisions.title_en: Miasma worm compromises 73 Microsoft GitHub repos, steals creds via AI coding tools
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Supply-chain worm disclosed 2026-06-08 (TechCrunch); credential-harvesting payload triggers when repos opened in Claude Code/Cursor/Gemini CLI/VS Code.

decisions.title_en: Standard Bots raises $200M Series C at $1B valuation for US-made AI-native robots
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. $200M Series C at $1B valuation announced 2026-06-09 (Bloomberg, PRNewswire), led by General Catalyst + RoboStrategy.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI launches Economic Research Exchange for external AI labor-impact research
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. OpenAI launched the Economic Research Exchange on 2026-06-08 (openai.com); applications close July 5.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic confidentially files for IPO at $965B valuation
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-06-01 is 9 days old (>5 day limit). The fresh angle (OpenAI matching it) is captured under openai-ipo-filing.

decisions.title_en: Pentagon tests OpenAI/Google/Grok to replace 'too safe' Anthropic Claude
decisions.reason: Underlying developments (Hegseth supply-chain-risk designation in March, Pentagon testing rivals) date to March-May 2026; June 8 coverage is rehash. >5 day limit.

decisions.title_en: Gemini 3.5 Pro expected to ship in June
decisions.reason: Announced at I/O 2026-05-19; still not shipped as of 06-10. No concrete release event within 5 days.

decisions.title_en: Mistral rebrands Le Chat as Vibe, one agent for work and code
decisions.reason: Launched 2026-05-28, >5 day limit. Slack-triggered Code Mode 'coming in June' has no concrete dated event.

decisions.title_en: NVIDIA launches Nemotron Coalition of 8 AI labs for open frontier models
decisions.reason: Announced at GTC 2026-03-16; far outside the 5-day window.

decisions.title_en: ChatGPT 'Dreaming' memory rolls out to Plus/Pro in US
decisions.reason: Already published on 06-04 (openai-chatgpt-dreaming-memory) describing the Dreaming memory system. June 9 is an incremental GA rollout to Plus/Pro with no substantively new facts.

decisions.title_en: Meta again delays Muse Spark developer API
decisions.reason: Already published on 06-04 (meta-muse-spark-api-delay). No new development since; still 'no scheduled date / testing with partners'.

decisions.title_en: Claude surges to 8.2% chatbot market share, ChatGPT falls to 54.7%
decisions.reason: Single low-reliability marketing-blog source with no corroboration from authoritative outlets; numbers unverifiable. Dropped for sourcing quality.
